name: ATR Breakout Retest XAUUSD M15
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, an ATR-measured displacement beyond prior structure (atr_breakout_level) followed by a controlled retest within 5 bars offers a higher-quality long/short entry than the naked breakout, because the retest filters fakeouts that plagued simple MA-cross logic.

entry_rules.long: prior bar had close > brk_lvl.upper by >=0.5*atr14; current bar retests within 0.2*atr14 of brk_lvl.upper and closes back above it; within 5 bars of breakout

notes: Distinct from cand_1 (no retest requirement) and cand_0 (session-range, not ATR-structure). Retest requirement is explicitly designed to avoid the churn/zero-edge seen in gen40.
